description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a rectangular, upholstered frame and a tall, tufted headboard. The headboard features a grid of evenly spaced buttons, giving it a plush, quilted appearance. The bed frame is fully upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric, with clean, straight lines and a low profile. The mattress is visible and covered with a fitted, light-colored sheet, with no additional bedding or decorative pillows present. The foot and side panels are solid and unadorned, matching the headboard's upholstery. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or staged outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, upholstered platform bed with a tall, tufted headboard and a visible mattress covered by a fitted sheet. The frame is light beige and features clean, minimalist lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, tufted headboard and the full width of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low profile, solid upholstered side panel, and the thickness of the mattress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, upholstered back of the headboard and the solid foot of the bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side panel and mattress thickness from the other side.
